summary: Full e2e testing of HGL video processing app - Fixed critical bug where VideoAIAnalysis was navigating to VideoEditor with null jobId. All UI flows working correctly. Backend video download fails due to YouTube 403 (anti-bot protection) but metadata extraction works.

critical.issue: YouTube video download fails with HTTP 403 Forbidden - yt-dlp needs JavaScript runtime for YouTube's anti-bot protection
critical.note: Metadata extraction works fine, only actual download fails

minor.issue: Login takes ~36 seconds due to bcrypt password hashing being slow on this system

integration_issues.issue: FIXED: Was navigating to /editor with jobId: null before API call completed

issues: ESLint warnings: useEffect missing dependencies - minor, non-blocking

action_items: CRITICAL: Install JavaScript runtime (deno/node) for yt-dlp to download YouTube videos - see https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp/wiki/EJS
OPTIONAL: Reduce bcrypt rounds to speed up login (currently ~36s)
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: VideoAIAnalysis.jsx handleProceed() was navigating before API call - now awaits startProcessing()
Added processing state to show 'Processando...' button while API call is in progress
YouTube download requires JavaScript runtime - yt-dlp shows warning about deprecated extraction without JS

success_rate.backend: 85% (6/7 tests pass, 1 timeout due to slow bcrypt)

context_for_next_testing_agent: VideoAIAnalysis bug fixed - now correctly passes jobId to VideoEditor. YouTube video download fails due to 403 (anti-bot) but metadata extraction works. Login is slow (~36s) due to bcrypt. All UI flows tested: Login → Dashboard → VideoConfigPage → VideoAIAnalysis → VideoEditor (processing view).

flows_tested: Dashboard URL input and Fazer Upload button
VideoConfigPage metadata display (title, duration, views, channel)
VideoAIAnalysis page with AI analysis simulation
Próximo button and process-clips API call

verified_features: Extração de metadados de vídeo real com yt-dlp - WORKING
Dashboard: colar URL do YouTube e clicar 'Fazer Upload' - WORKING
VideoConfigPage: exibir metadados (título, duração, views, canal) - WORKING
VideoConfigPage: calcular número de cortes - WORKING
VideoAIAnalysis: página intermediária com análise IA - WORKING
VideoEditor: mostra etapas de processamento - WORKING
known_limitations: YouTube video download fails with 403 Forbidden - requires JavaScript runtime for yt-dlp
Actual video clips cannot be generated until download issue is resolved
Login is slow (~36s) due to bcrypt on this system

bug_fixed.description: VideoAIAnalysis was navigating to VideoEditor with jobId: null
bug_fixed.root_cause: handleProceed() called navigate() before startProcessing() API call completed
bug_fixed.fix: Changed handleProceed to async function that awaits startProcessing() before navigation
